inputs.label: Catchment Area
inputs.businessContext: Total impervious area draining to the SUDS feature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total impervious area draining to the SUDS feature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: SUDS yapısına drene olan toplam geçirimsiz alan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte undurchlässige Fläche, die zur SUDS-Anlage entwässert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface imperméable totale drainant vers l'élément SUDS.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área impermeable total que drena hacia el sistema SUDS.

inputs.label: Design Rainfall Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Intensity for the design storm event, typically from IDF curves.

businessContext_i18n.en: Intensity for the design storm event, typically from IDF curves.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle IDF eğrilerinden alınan tasarım fırtına olayı için şiddet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Intensität für das Bemessungsregenereignis, typischerweise aus IDF-Kurven.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intensité pour l'événement de tempête de conception, typiquement à partir de courbes IDF.
businessContext_i18n.es: Intensidad para el evento de tormenta de diseño, típicamente de curvas IDF.

inputs.label: Runoff Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of runoff to rainfall, based on surface type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of runoff to rainfall, based on surface type.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzey tipine bağlı olarak yağışın akışa oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis von Abfluss zu Niederschlag, basierend auf der Oberflächenart.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport entre le ruissellement et les précipitations, selon le type de surface.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de escorrentía a lluvia, según el tipo de superficie.

inputs.label: Storm Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the design storm event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the design storm event.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de l'événement pluvieux de conception.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del evento de tormenta de diseño.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor of safety to account for uncertainties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor of safety to account for uncertainties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için güvenlik faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité pour tenir compte des incertitudes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad para considerar incertidumbres.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
